name: Raindrop Ventures Inc.
summary: Raindrop Ventures Inc. explores for and develops mineral properties in Canada and the United States. The company explores for silver, gold, and base metal properties. Its principal projects include the Silver Star property, which consists of 4 claims totaling 1,487 hectares located to the Southeast of Houston, British Columbia; and the Clover Mountain property consisting of 43 claims totaling 348 hectares located to the south west of Boise, Idaho. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
